understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by moving selectable pieces onto every goal tile (marked +) simultaneously. The run ends in WIN when all goals are occupied; otherwise, the level fails when steps run out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid increments. If an adjacent pushable block exists, pushing can occur. Walls impede movement. Selection is switched using the CLICK action with a target_position that must exactly match the pixel coordinates of another selectable piece. The heuristic 'movement blocked' flags may be false positives. The semantic_grid shows P for the current piece, S for other selectables, # for walls, B for blocks, and + for goals.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by moving selectable pieces onto every goal tile (marked +) simultaneously. The run ends in WIN when all goals are occupied; otherwise, the level fails when steps run out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid increments. If an adjacent pushable block exists, pushing can occur. Walls impede movement. Selection is switched using the CLICK action with a target_position that must exactly match the pixel coordinates of another selectable piece. The heuristic 'movement blocked' flags may be false positives. The semantic_grid shows P for the current piece, S for other selectables, # for walls, B for blocks, and + for goals.
